title: Deep Reinforcement Learning (Full Course)
summary: Five homework assignments and two final projects covering the full Deep RL curriculum: imitation learning (HW1), policy gradients (HW2), Q-learning and actor-critic (HW3), LLM RL with REINFORCE/GRPO (HW4), offline RL (HW5), and two final projects extending offline-online RL and LLM RL with advanced algorithms.
instructionPreview: This task covers a full deep-reinforcement-learning sequence (5 homeworks + 2 final projects). You must implement core RL algorithms across all modules. Your working directory is `/workspace`. Each homework is a self-contained Python package under its own directory.
instruction:
This task covers a full deep-reinforcement-learning sequence (5 homeworks + 2 final
projects). You must implement core RL algorithms across all modules. Your working directory
is `/workspace`. Each homework is a self-contained Python package under its own directory.

## HW1 — Imitation Learning (hw1/)
PYTHONPATH=/workspace/hw1/src

Implement in `hw1/src/hw1_imitation/model.py`:
- `MSEPolicy`: MLP that predicts action chunks with MSE loss. Implement `__init__`,
  `compute_loss`, and `sample_actions`.
- `FlowMatchingPolicy`: Conditional flow matching policy. Implement `__init__` (velocity
  network taking state + noisy action + time), `compute_loss` (interpolate noise/action,
  predict velocity, MSE), and `sample_actions` (Euler ODE integration from noise).

Implement in `hw1/src/hw1_imitation/train.py`:
- `run_training`: Main training loop — AdamW optimizer, epoch iteration, compute_loss,
  backward, periodic evaluation via `evaluate_policy`.

## HW2 — Policy Gradients (hw2/)
PYTHONPATH=/workspace/hw2/src

Implement in `hw2/src/agents/pg_agent.py`:
- `_discounted_return`, `_discounted_reward_to_go`, `_calculate_q_vals`: Q-value estimation.
- `update`: Flatten trajectory lists, compute advantages, update actor and critic.
- `_estimate_advantage`: Advantages with optional baseline and GAE (lambda-weighted TD errors).

Implement in `hw2/src/networks/policies.py`:
- `MLPPolicy.forward`: Categorical (discrete) or Normal (continuous) distribution.
- `MLPPolicy.get_action`: Sample action from distribution.
- `MLPPolicyPG.update`: Policy gradient loss with log-prob weighting.

Implement in `hw2/src/networks/critics.py`:
- `ValueCritic.forward` and `ValueCritic.update`: Value baseline network.

## HW3 — Q-Learning and Actor-Critic (hw3/)
PYTHONPATH=/workspace/hw3/src

Implement in `hw3/src/agents/dqn_agent.py`:
- `get_action`: Epsilon-greedy action selection.
- `update_critic`: Bellman MSE with target network, optional double-Q.
- `update`: Calls update_critic and periodic target update.

Implement in `hw3/src/agents/sac_agent.py`:
- `get_temperature`, `q_backup_strategy`: SAC temperature and clipped double-Q.
- `update_critic`: Soft Bellman target with entropy bonus.
- `entropy`, `actor_loss_reparametrize`: Entropy computation and reparameterized actor loss.
- `update_actor`: Actor loss minus temperature-weighted entropy.
- `update_alpha`: Dual gradient descent on entropy constraint.
- `update`: Full SAC update loop.

Implement in `hw3/src/networks/policies.py`:
- `MLPPolicy.forward` and `MLPPolicy.get_action`: Policy network forward/action selection.

Implement in `hw3/src/networks/critics.py`:
- `DQNCritic.forward` and `StateActionCritic.forward`: Q-network forward passes.

Implement in `hw3/src/infrastructure/utils.py`:
- `sample_trajectory`, `sample_trajectories`, `sample_n_trajectories`, `compute_metrics`,
  `convert_listofrollouts`: Trajectory sampling and data utilities.

Implement in `hw3/src/infrastructure/replay_buffer.py`:
- `ReplayBuffer.insert`, `MemoryEfficientReplayBuffer.insert/on_reset/_insert_frame/_compute_frame_history_idcs`.

Implement in `hw3/src/scripts/run_dqn.py` and `hw3/src/scripts/run_sac.py`:
- Fill in action selection and replay buffer update calls.

## HW4 — LLM RL (hw4/)
PYTHONPATH includes hw4/

Implement in `hw4/hw4/models/logprobs.py`:
- `compute_per_token_logprobs`: Forward pass, cross-entropy per token.
- `build_completion_mask`: Binary mask for completion vs prompt tokens.
- `approx_kl_from_logprobs`: KL approximation (exp(delta) - delta - 1).

Implement in `hw4/hw4/rl/reinforce.py`:
- REINFORCE `update`: Recompute log-probs, masked per-row aggregation, advantage-weighted loss.

Implement in `hw4/hw4/rl/grpo.py`:
- GRPO `update`: PPO-style clipped surrogate with importance ratios, KL penalty.

Implement in `hw4/hw4/train.py`:
- `compute_group_advantages`: Per-group z-score normalization.
- `maybe_normalize_advantages`: Global z-score normalization.

Implement in `hw4/hw4/rollout/rollout_buffer.py`:
- `iter_minibatches`: Random-permutation minibatch iterator.

## HW5 — Offline RL (hw5/)
PYTHONPATH=/workspace/hw5/src

Implement in `hw5/src/agents/sacbc_agent.py`:
- `update_q`, `update_actor`, `update_target_critic`: SAC+BC with ensemble Q,
  BC regularization, and Polyak averaging.

Implement in `hw5/src/agents/iql_agent.py`:
- `iql_expectile_loss`, `update_v`, `update_q`, `update_actor`, `update_target_critic`:
  IQL with expectile regression and advantage-weighted actor.

Implement in `hw5/src/agents/fql_agent.py`:
- `get_action`, `get_bc_action`, `update_q`, `update_bc_actor`, `update_onestep_actor`,
  `update_target_critic`: Flow Q-Learning with flow-based BC actor and one-step distillation.

Implement in `hw5/src/networks/rl_networks.py`:
- `Policy.forward`, `DeterministicPolicy.forward`, `VectorFieldPolicy.forward`.

Implement in `hw5/src/infrastructure/`:
- `pytorch_util.py`: `build_mlp`, `build_ensemble_mlp`.
- `replay_buffer.py`: `ReplayBuffer.insert`, `ReplayBuffer.sample`.
- `utils.py`: `sample_trajectory`, `sample_trajectories`, `sample_n_trajectories`.

Implement in `hw5/src/scripts/run.py`:
- `run_training_loop`: Main offline RL training loop.

## Final Project: Offline-Online RL (final_project_offline_online/)
PYTHONPATH=/workspace/final_project_offline_online/problem/src

Implement all stubbed agent methods in `agents/`:
- `sacbc_agent.py`: `update_q`, `update_actor`, `update_target_critic`.
- `fql_agent.py`: `get_action`, `get_bc_action`, `update_q`, `update_bc_actor`,
  `update_onestep_actor`, `update_target_critic`.
- `ifql_agent.py`: All methods — expectile loss, value/Q updates, flow-based action
  sampling, advantage-weighted actor update.
- `qsm_agent.py`: All methods — cosine beta schedule, DDPM sampling, Q-weighted
  score matching actor update.
- `dsrl_agent.py`: All methods — flow-based action sampling, dual Q networks (Q and Qz),
  noise actor with entropy-regularized policy gradient, alpha tuning.

Implement config factories in `configs/dsrl_config.py`, `configs/ifql_config.py`,
`configs/qsm_config.py`.

## Final Project: LLM RL (final_project_llm_rl/)

Implement in `llm_rl_final_proj/models/logprobs.py`:
- `compute_per_token_logprobs`, `build_completion_mask`, `approx_kl_from_logprobs`.

Implement in `llm_rl_final_proj/rl/`:
- `grpo.py`, `dr_grpo.py`, `gspo.py`: PPO-style clipped surrogate RL updates with
  KL penalty and clipfrac tracking.

Implement in `llm_rl_final_proj/offline/losses.py`:
- DPO, IPO, and AOT preference losses inside `compute_offline_preference_loss`.

Implement in `llm_rl_final_proj/rollout/rollout_buffer.py`:
- `iter_minibatches`: Random-permutation minibatch iterator.

Implement in `llm_rl_final_proj/reward_model/train.py`:
- `_compute_pair_metrics`: Bradley-Terry loss and accuracy.

Implement in `llm_rl_final_proj/online/train_rm_grpo.py`:
- `_compute_group_advantages`, `_algo_divides_advantages_by_std`.

## Testing

moduleDag.description: Five homework assignments and two final projects covering the full Deep RL curriculum: imitation learning (HW1), policy gradients (HW2), Q-learning and actor-critic (HW3), LLM RL with REINFORCE/GRPO (HW4), offline RL (HW5), and two final projects extending offline-online RL and LLM RL with advanced algorithms.

nodes.label: HW1: Imitation Learning
nodes.description: Implements MSEPolicy (MLP with MSE loss on action chunks) and FlowMatchingPolicy (conditional flow matching via Euler ODE integration), plus the run_training loop with AdamW optimizer and periodic evaluation.

nodes.label: HW2: Policy Gradients
nodes.description: Implements MLPPolicy (forward pass producing Categorical/Normal distributions), ValueCritic (baseline network), and PGAgent with discounted returns, reward-to-go, GAE-lambda advantage estimation, and actor/critic update.

nodes.label: HW3: Trajectory Utils & Replay Buffer
nodes.description: Provides trajectory sampling utilities (sample_trajectory, sample_trajectories, sample_n_trajectories, compute_metrics, convert_listofrollouts) and ReplayBuffer / MemoryEfficientReplayBuffer with frame-history indexing for DQN and SAC training.

nodes.label: HW3: Critic and Policy Networks
nodes.description: Implements DQNCritic (discrete Q-network forward pass) and StateActionCritic (continuous Q-network), plus MLPPolicy with forward/get_action for continuous action spaces used by SAC.

nodes.label: HW4: Logprobs & Rollout Buffer
nodes.description: Foundational LLM RL utilities: compute_per_token_logprobs (forward pass + cross-entropy per token), build_completion_mask (binary prompt/completion mask), approx_kl_from_logprobs (KL approximation), and iter_minibatches (random-permutation minibatch iterator).

nodes.label: HW5: PyTorch Utils, Replay Buffer & Trajectory Utils
nodes.description: Provides build_mlp and build_ensemble_mlp (MLP factory functions), offline ReplayBuffer with insert/sample, and trajectory sampling utilities for continuous offline RL environments.

nodes.label: HW3: DQN Agent
nodes.description: Implements DQNAgent with epsilon-greedy action selection, Bellman MSE critic update with optional double-Q, periodic target network update, and the run_dqn.py training script that wires replay buffer insertions and agent updates.

nodes.label: HW3: SAC Agent
nodes.description: Implements SoftActorCritic with temperature parameter, clipped double-Q backup, entropy-regularized soft Bellman target, reparameterized actor loss, dual gradient descent alpha update, and the run_sac.py training script.

nodes.label: HW4: REINFORCE and GRPO
nodes.description: Implements REINFORCE (masked per-row log-prob aggregation with advantage weighting) and GRPO (PPO-style clipped surrogate with importance ratios and KL penalty), both using per-token logprobs and minibatch iteration from hw4_foundation.

nodes.label: HW5: RL Policy Networks
nodes.description: Implements Policy (stochastic, outputs tanh-transformed Normal distribution), DeterministicPolicy (outputs a single deterministic action), and VectorFieldPolicy (velocity-field network for flow-based action generation), all built with pytorch_util.

nodes.label: HW4: Training Orchestration & Advantage Normalization
nodes.description: Implements compute_group_advantages (per-group z-score normalization) and maybe_normalize_advantages (global z-score normalization), and the main single-GPU LoRA LLM-RL training loop that coordinates rollout, advantage computation, and REINFORCE/GRPO updates.

nodes.label: HW5: SAC+BC Agent (Offline Baseline)
nodes.description: Implements the offline SAC+BC agent: ensemble Q update with TD target, actor update combining SAC objective with BC regularization (alpha-weighted), and Polyak-averaged target critic update.

nodes.label: HW5: IQL, FQL Agents & Training Script
nodes.description: Implements IQLAgent (expectile regression value update, advantage-weighted actor), FQLAgent (flow-based BC actor, one-step distillation actor, Q-weighted flow update), and run.py offline RL training loop.

nodes.label: Final LLM RL: Logprobs & Rollout Buffer
nodes.description: Reimplements hw4_foundation in the final project package: compute_per_token_logprobs, build_completion_mask, approx_kl_from_logprobs, and iter_minibatches — the shared infrastructure required by all RL algorithms and offline losses in the final project.

nodes.label: Final Offline-Online: SAC+BC and FQL Agents
nodes.description: Reimplements and adapts hw5's SAC+BC and FQL agents in the offline-online project package, serving as the baseline offline agents before online fine-tuning is added in more advanced agents.

nodes.label: Final LLM RL: GRPO, DR-GRPO, GSPO
nodes.description: Implements three PPO-style RL algorithms for LLM fine-tuning: GRPO (clipped surrogate + KL penalty), DR-GRPO (diverse reward variant), and GSPO (GSPO variant with clipfrac tracking) — all importing from fp_llm_foundation for logprobs and minibatching.

nodes.label: Final LLM RL: Offline Preference Losses
nodes.description: Implements compute_offline_preference_loss containing DPO (direct preference optimization), IPO (identity preference optimization), and AOT (advantage-over-threshold) preference losses using per-token logprobs from fp_llm_foundation.

nodes.label: Final Offline-Online: IFQL, QSM, DSRL Agents & Configs
nodes.description: Implements three novel offline-online agents: IFQLAgent (combines IQL expectile loss with FQL flow actions), QSMAgent (Q-guided score matching DDPM actor), DSRLAgent (dual Q-networks with flow-based BC + noise actor + entropy-regularized PG), plus their config factory functions.

nodes.label: Final LLM RL: Reward Model Training & Online GRPO
nodes.description: Implements _compute_pair_metrics (Bradley-Terry loss + accuracy) for reward model training, and the online training pipeline (train_rm_grpo.py) that orchestrates reward model scoring with GRPO/DR-GRPO/GSPO RL updates and group advantage normalization.

edges.label: run_dqn.py calls ReplayBuffer.insert/sample; trajectory utils define the data format fed to DQNAgent
DQNCritic is passed as make_critic to DQNAgent constructor
run_sac.py calls ReplayBuffer.insert/sample; utils provides trajectory conversion for SAC training
StateActionCritic and MLPPolicy passed as make_critic/make_actor to SoftActorCritic constructor
SAC is an actor-critic algorithm; its actor update uses policy gradient log-prob weighting established in hw2
reinforce.py and grpo.py both import compute_per_token_logprobs, build_completion_mask, and iter_minibatches from hw4_foundation
REINFORCE in hw4 is the LLM-RL variant of policy gradients from hw2; understanding PG is a prerequisite for the masked log-prob advantage formulation
train.py imports REINFORCE and GRPO, calls their update methods inside the main training loop
rl_networks.py imports build_mlp from infrastructure.pytorch_util to construct all network architectures
sacbc_agent imports pytorch_util for tensor ops; training loop uses ReplayBuffer.insert/sample from infrastructure
SACBCAgent takes Policy/DeterministicPolicy (from rl_networks) as make_actor/make_beta constructor arguments
hw5 SAC+BC is the offline variant of hw3's online SAC; the critic/actor update structure directly extends hw3 SAC
IQL and FQL agents import pytorch_util; training loop in run.py uses ReplayBuffer from infrastructure
FQLAgent takes VectorFieldPolicy (from rl_networks) as make_bc_actor constructor argument for flow-based BC
IQL and FQL are more advanced offline RL algorithms; SAC+BC establishes the offline framework and is the simpler baseline to implement first
fp offline_online sacbc_agent reimplements hw5 SAC+BC in a new package; requires mastery of hw5 SAC+BC structure
fp offline_online fql_agent reimplements hw5 FQL with online fine-tuning capability; requires mastery of hw5 FQL
IFQLAgent combines IQL + FQL; QSM and DSRL agents share the sacbc/fql offline framework established by fp_oo_baseline
fp_llm reimplements the same logprobs/rollout patterns from hw4; complete hw4 training infrastructure before extending to the final project
grpo.py, dr_grpo.py, and gspo.py all import compute_per_token_logprobs, approx_kl_from_logprobs, and iter_minibatches from fp_llm_foundation
offline/losses.py imports compute_per_token_logprobs and masked_mean_per_row from fp_llm_foundation for DPO/IPO/AOT loss computation
online/train_rm_grpo.py uses RolloutBatch from rollout_buffer and logprobs utilities from fp_llm_foundation
online/train_rm_grpo.py directly imports GRPO, DrGRPO, GSPO from fp_llm_rl_algos for the RL update step
